ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of departure */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the primary airline */,
  "operated_by" TEXT /* Name of the airline operating the flight */,
  "operated_flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number of the operating airline */,
  "departure_airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the departure airport */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terminal where the flight departs */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight departs or arrives */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim number for arriving flights */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., Scheduled, Delayed, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_operated_by FOREIGN KEY ("operated_by") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_flight_status FOREIGN KEY ("flight_status") REFERENCES flight_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal */,
  "terminal_code" TEXT /* Code of the terminal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the terminal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight detail */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "operational_details" TEXT /* Operational details of the flight */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the flight */,
  "crew_details" TEXT /* Information about the flight crew */,
  "technical_details" TEXT /* Technical details of the aircraft */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_details_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airport staff, ground crew, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational activity */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of operational activity (e.g., boarding, takeoff, landing) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the operational activity */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who performed the activity */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
